title: cousinia sagittata subsp. sagittata
intro: Cousinia sagittata subsp. sagittata, also known as the Arrowhead, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and rhizomes, which contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cousinia sagittata subsp. sagittata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
